content.en:
"Mountain Lord, what should we do next?"

Jin Chen Daozu asked.

The Wind Mountain Lord was silent for a while, and said, "Next, you try not to leave the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, even if you want to leave, you must at least three of you go out together, so it is safer." In addition, I am going to open the three refining voids of Wind Mountain's soul refining, body refining, and Dao refining. "

"What, to open the Three Refining Void!"

Jin Chen Dao Ancestor, they were shocked one by one.

The Three Refining Void is the most precious treasure of the Wind Mountain, and its value may not be as good as the Eternal Source Stone Statue, but in a certain sense, it is even more precious than the Eternal Source Stone Statue, because the Three Refining Void is aimed at directly improving the strength of the Dao Ancestors, while the Eternal Source Stone Statue cannot instantly improve the strength of the Dao Ancestors.

Under normal circumstances, it would be impossible for Feng Mountain to open the Three Refining Void.

Because the cost of the construction of the Three Refining Void is too great, and it uses a special treasure from the Dark Forbidden Domain, and it is a consumable special treasure, once it is consumed, the Three Refining Void will be equivalent to being wasted.

Moreover, every time the Three Refining Void is opened, the resources consumed are difficult to calculate.

Even a half-step domain ancestor may not be qualified to enter the Three Refining Void Cultivation.

For example, among the many half-step domain ancestors present, only a few half-step domain ancestors had entered the three-step void once, while most of the half-step domain ancestors had never entered the three-step void, and they didn't even know about the existence of the three-step void.

Ye Tian didn't know about the Three Refining Void, so he sent a message to the Eternal Dao Ancestor who was more familiar with him, and asked the Eternal Dao Ancestor about the Three Refining Void.

The Eternal Dao Ancestor immediately responded to Ye Tian and informed him of the situation of the Three Refining Void.

It turns out that the so-called Three Refining Void is used to refine the soul, body and Dao power of Dao Ancestor, and it is tempered in the way of crushing and regeneration, the soul is crushed and then refined, the physical body is crushed and refined, and the Dao power is annihilated and reborn and compressed.

If it is in the outside world, if Dao Ancestor refines like this, it is tantamount to looking for death.

But in the Three Refining Void, Dao Ancestor will hardly die, he will only endure unimaginable pain, and how much benefit he can get depends on how long he can persevere.

The effect of entering the Three Refining Void for the first time is the best, the second time is second, and the third time is almost hopeless.

Once the Three Refining Void is opened, Black Wind Mountain may be able to give birth to a few or even more than ten half-step domain ancestors, and perhaps a few Ten Thousand Things Realm half-step domain ancestors.

This is very important for today's situation, and it can relieve the pressure on the Black Wind Mountain.

In order to be able to compete with the Devouring Clan, Black Wind Mountain can be regarded as revealing its hole cards.

At this time, the Wind Mountain Mountain Lord announced, "This time, I am going to select 20 of the Invincible Dao Ancestors to enter the Three Refining Void with the highest priority, and all the half-step Domain Ancestors can also enter the Three Refining Void. But the half-step domain ancestor had to pay a lot of forbidden strange things, otherwise our treasure house of Black Wind Mountain would not be able to support so many Dao Ancestors to enter the Three Refining Void Refinement. I guess everyone has no opinion, right?"

"No comments!"

A half-step domain ancestor hurriedly said.

What an opportunity to be able to enter the Three Refining Void Cultivation, even if they were asked to pay all the forbidden and strange things on their bodies, they would not object!

Originally, Ye Tian was an invincible Dao Ancestor and could enter the Three Refining Void for free to cultivate, but the Wind Mountain Lord and other half-step domain ancestors did not regard him as an invincible Dao Ancestor at all, and they also wanted him to pay forbidden strange things.

Ye Tian also honestly handed over a large number of forbidden strange things, after all, he estimated that he had lasted for a long time, and the cost of consumption was greater than that of other half-step domain ancestors, if he didn't pay for forbidden strange things, it would be a bit too much.

Subsequently.

Black Wind Mountain shared information about the Devouring Clan with the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and also threw the half-dead Devourer Clan to the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

The Heavenly Emperor Palace received the information from the Black Wind Mountain, and interrogated the half-dead Devourer again, and after confirming that the information was correct, the Devourer was executed.

Heavenly Emperor's Palace.

The faces of the Dragon Shadow Palace Lord and the other palace masters were very bad, because judging from the information they had obtained, the power of the Devouring Clan was too strong, far surpassing their Heavenly Emperor Palace, even if they joined forces with the Black Wind Mountain, they would not be the opponents of the Devouring Clan!

"I propose to use the Stone Pupil Gate again, and use all the remaining two chances!"

The Dragon Shadow Palace Lord proposed.

"Agreed!"

"Agreed!"

One by one the palace masters agreed, even the palace masters who knew that they had no hope of obtaining the quota of the Stone Pupil Gate also agreed, after all, the Heavenly Emperor Palace can only survive this crisis if it is strong, otherwise the Heavenly Emperor Palace is gone, and they are gone.

Therefore, at this time, it is not a question of who will be entangled in the chance, but to work together to help the Heavenly Emperor Palace grow its strength.

After discussion, the Heavenly Emperor Palace gave the remaining two places to the Thunder Tribulation Palace Lord and the Heavenly Punishment Palace Master, their strength is not weak, and their potential is not bad, they have the hope of being promoted to the Half-Step Domain Ancestor of the Guiyi Realm.

It can be said that as long as another Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor is born, the pressure on the Heavenly Emperor Palace will be much less, and it will also have the confidence to face the Devouring Clan.

-----------------

Windy Mountain.

Ye Tian and many half-step domain ancestors, plus the other 19 invincible Dao ancestors, came to an ancient stone gate.

This stone gate is the gateway to enter the Three Refining Void, if there is no Wind Mountain Lord to open the portal, the half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm will not be able to enter.

"Open!"

The Wind Mountain Lord activated the portal, forming a void passage that connected the Three Refining Voids.

Whoa!!!

A half-step domain ancestor and an invincible Dao Ancestor entered the Three Refining Void, and Ye Tian also entered it.

When all these Dao Ancestors entered, the Wind Mountain Lord muttered, "I hope that Wind Mountain can give birth to more half-step domain ancestors and all things realm half-step domain ancestors this time!"

Immediately, he sat and waited, and did not go in.

The Three Refining Void was useful to others, but it was of little use to him, because he had entered the Three Refining Void many times.

Three refining the void.

An independent void, Ye Tian entered here, and did not perceive the traces of other half-step domain ancestors and invincible Dao ancestors.

Obviously, everyone is out of an independent void and not together.

This is also normal, if we are together, if we cultivate together, wouldn't it be very easy to influence others.

Three refining the void, refining the soul first!

The soul is the most important, once the soul is tempered to the extreme, it is difficult to continue to bear it, and after the three refining voids perceive it, it will stop refining the soul and turn to refining the body.

Ye Tian stood in the void, waiting for the arrival of the soul refining.
